'''zhakowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obdurateness|obdurateness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obdurateness|obdurateness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhakowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhækeweth|zhækeweth]] || [[word:zhækewej|zhækewej]] || [[word:zhækewesh|zhækewesh]] || [[word:zhækewe|zhækewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakokowoth|zhakokowoth]] || [[word:zhakokowoj|zhakokowoj]] || [[word:zhakokowosh|zhakokowosh]] || [[word:zhakokowo|zhakokowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakowoth|zhakowoth]] || [[word:zhakowoj|zhakowoj]] || [[word:zhakowosh|zhakowosh]] || [[word:zhakowo|zhakowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakofwofth|zhakofwofth]] || [[word:zhakofwofj|zhakofwofj]] || [[word:zhakofwofsh|zhakofwofsh]] || [[word:zhakofwof|zhakofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakowotho|zhakowotho]] || [[word:zhakowojo|zhakowojo]] || [[word:zhakowosho|zhakowosho]] || [[word:zhakowoko|zhakowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakowoth|zhakowoth]] || [[word:zhakowoj|zhakowoj]] || [[word:zhakowosh|zhakowosh]] || [[word:zhakowo|zhakowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakowothol|zhakowothol]] || [[word:zhakowojol|zhakowojol]] || [[word:zhakowoshol|zhakowoshol]] || [[word:zhakowokol|zhakowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakowoothotho|zhakowoothotho]] || [[word:zhakowoojojo|zhakowoojojo]] || [[word:zhakowooshosho|zhakowooshosho]] || [[word:zhakowooko|zhakowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakowothon|zhakowothon]] || [[word:zhakowojon|zhakowojon]] || [[word:zhakowoshon|zhakowoshon]] || [[word:zhakowokon|zhakowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakowothooro|zhakowothooro]] || [[word:zhakowojooro|zhakowojooro]] || [[word:zhakowoshooro|zhakowoshooro]] || [[word:zhakowokooro|zhakowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
